reviews.name: Анна К.
reviews.quote_ru: Качество ткани превзошло ожидания. Хаори стала моей любимой вещью в гардеробе.
reviews.quote_en: The fabric quality exceeded my expectations. The haori became my favorite piece in my wardrobe.

reviews.name: Мария Л.
reviews.quote_ru: Невероятная работа! Каждый стежок сделан с душой. Ношу уже полгода — как новая.
reviews.quote_en: Incredible craftsmanship! Every stitch is made with soul. I've been wearing it for six months — looks brand new.

reviews.name: Елена В.
reviews.quote_ru: Купила в подарок сестре — она была в восторге. Теперь заказываю себе вторую!
reviews.quote_en: Bought it as a gift for my sister — she was thrilled. Now ordering a second one for myself!

notes: All reviews are anonymized to protect customer privacy (no PII)
Only initials and city provided for reviewer identification
Verified purchases confirmed through order system
Reviews selected based on authenticity and detail
